name: claude-dynamic-workflows-codex
description: Run Claude Code's dynamic-workflow orchestration on a local Codex (GPT) backend, plus an interactive run viewer.
author: Stephen Casella

scripts.test: node runner/test/offline.js && node runner/test/codex-session.test.js && node runner/test/app-server-contract.test.js && node runner/test/view-run.test.js && node runner/test/view-run.live.test.js && node runner/test/map-run.test.js && node runner/test/summarize-run.test.js && node runner/test/goal-lint.plan.test.js && node runner/test/claim-check.plan.test.js && node runner/test/serve.test.js && node runner/test/fleet.test.js && node runner/test/supervise.test.js && node runner/test/compare-runs.test.js && node runner/test/examples.plan.test.js
